title: Duration Calculator
description: Parse durations like 1d2h30m, convert across units (ms/s/m/h/d/w), humanize, clock-format, and add/subtract to a base time. Fully local.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing and conversion run in your browser. Compound forms like 1d2h30m / 90m / 1.5h / 500ms are supported; a bare number is treated as seconds.

input.label: Duration
input.error: Cannot parse — try 1d2h30m / 90m / 1.5h / 500ms or a bare number of seconds
